After [[Ruul (planet)|Ruul]] was seized by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], the Empire began to strip-mine the planet. In the strip-mined canyons, it set up several '''mines''' that plunged deeper into the cliff faces.

When the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] seized Ruul's [[Ruul computer complex|central computer complex]], it also took over several mines in the vicinity. These mines were recaptured along with the computer facility when [[Brenn Tantor]] led an effort to drive the Alliance off the planet.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Force Commander]]''
